message:
feat(config): consolidate magic numbers into TuningConfig and add configurable Kitty image budget

Tuning constant consolidation:
- Extract all scattered magic numbers across runtime.rs, patterns.rs,
  ipc.rs, and workflows/handlers.rs into named public associated
  constants on their respective TuningConfig structs (RuntimeTuning,
  BackpressureTuning, PatternsTuning, IpcTuning, WorkflowsTuning,
  CassQueryConfig).
- Each call site now references the canonical constant (e.g.,
  RuntimeTuning::DEFAULT_OUTPUT_COALESCE_WINDOW_MS) instead of
  duplicating the numeric value. This means changing a default in one
  place automatically propagates to both the config Default impl and
  the runtime constant, eliminating drift.

Constants consolidated:
- RuntimeTuning: output coalesce (window, max_delay, max_bytes),
  telemetry percentile window, resize watchdog (warning, critical,
  stalled_limit, sample_limit), storage lock (wait_warn, hold_warn),
  cursor snapshot memory warn, state detection max age
- BackpressureTuning: warn_ratio
- PatternsTuning: max_seen_keys, max_tail_size_bytes,
  bloom_false_positive_rate
- IpcTuning: max_message_size
- WorkflowsTuning + CassQueryConfig: session_start and on_error
  cooldowns, hint limits, timeouts, lookback days, query/hint max chars

Configurable Kitty image budget:
- Add kitty_image_budget_bytes field to Config (default 320 MiB),
  wired through the full config chain: config.rs → lib.rs default fn
  → terminal.rs TerminalConfiguration impl → term/config.rs trait
  default → kitty.rs KittyImageState field → mod.rs initialization.
- Replace the hardcoded 320*1024*1024 in KittyImageState::prune_unreferenced
  with self.image_budget_bytes, resolving the "FIXME: make this
  configurable" comment.
- KittyImageState now implements Default manually (was derive) to set
  the image_budget_bytes field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
